package rulecoverage

func PositiveWorldReadableFilePermissions() string {
    ruleID := "world_readable_file_permissions"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`os.OpenFile(path, flag, 0666)` or `os.WriteFile(path, data, 0777)` with world-readable/writable permissions"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
